creator: semprix@bsdmail.org
text:
Fixed patch for rainbowcrack-1.2 as per advised by committer wxs

Makefile.diff -  patch for Makefile
   -Updated master site
   -Update maintainer

rainbowcrack-1.2.diff - patch for work/rainbowcrack-1.2
     -Updated HashAlgorithm.h HashAlgorithm.cpp HashRoutine.cpp
     -Update will enable rainbowcrack to support NTLM, MD2, MD4 and RIPEMD160 algorithm
